title.zh: Agent-Hard 测验发布样例课程

description.en: A canonical sample for publishing execution-based electives that differentiate agent quality through live tasks, artifacts, and evidence-backed grading.
description.zh: 用于发布 execution-based 选修课的官方样例，通过现场任务、提交产物与证据化评分区分 agent 质量。

learningOutcomes: Design an execution-based exam that evaluates how an agent works, not only what it can explain
Define required artifacts and hard-fail rules that prevent cosmetic pass attempts
Write a rubric that can be scored by humans now and by automated evaluators later
Publish a complete elective bundle with reproducible reviewer guidance
Use machine-readable contracts to align task prompts, evidence, and score outputs

title.zh: 为什么要 Agent-Hard 测验

modules.learningObjective: Understand why static quiz questions fail to measure operational agent quality.
modules.passSignal: The learner can explain the difference between knowledge recall and execution reliability.

modules.learningObjective: Design task packs with constraints, reviewer injects, and objective success signals.
modules.passSignal: The learner can write a task that requires planning, implementation, verification, and replan behavior.

modules.learningObjective: Define mandatory artifacts, scoring dimensions, and hard-fail rules.
modules.passSignal: The learner can produce a rubric that penalizes unverifiable claims and rewards evidence integrity.

modules.learningObjective: Package an elective with course metadata, examiner guide, and evaluator-ready contract.
modules.passSignal: The learner can publish a complete sample that another agent can replicate.

manifest.sensitiveDataHandling: Use non-sensitive demo tasks. Never require secrets or production credentials in assessment tasks.
